css: .toc-wrapper { page-break-after: always; } .toc-title { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.9em; font-weight: 700; color: #0d3b66; border-bottom: 3px solid #0d3b66; padding-bottom: 0.35em; margin-bottom: 1.2em; } .toc { line-height: 1.9; } .toc-entry { margin: 0; } .toc-entry a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .toc-h1 { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05em; font-weight: 700; color: #0d3b66; margin-top: 0.7em; } .toc-h1 a { color: #0d3b66; } .toc-h1 a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .toc-h2 { font-size: 0.97em; color: #1a6b9a; } .toc-h2 a { color: #1a6b9a; } .toc-h3 { font-size: 0.9em; color: #2e86ab; } .toc-h3 a { color: #2e86ab; } body { font-family: 'Palatino Linotype', 'Palatino', 'Book Antiqua', Georgia, serif; font-size: 10.5pt; line-height: 1.75; max-width: 780px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2cm; color: #1a1a2e; } h1 { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.9em; font-weight: 700; color: #0d3b66; border-bottom: 3px solid #0d3b66; padding-bottom: 0.35em; margin-top: 0; page-break-before: always; page-break-after: avoid; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } h1:first-of-type { page-break-before: avoid; } h2 { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: 600; color: #1a6b9a; margin-top: 2em; margin-bottom: 0.4em; page-break-after: avoid; border-left: 4px solid #1a6b9a; padding-left: 0.6em; } h3 { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: 600; color: #2e86ab; margin-top: 1.5em; page-break-after: avoid; } h4 { font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1em; font-weight: 600; color: #3a7ca5; } p { margin: 0.65em 0; color: #1a1a2e; } li { margin: 0.25em 0; color: #1a1a2e; } strong { color: #0d3b66; } em { color: #2e4057; } pre { font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', 'Menlo', monospace; font-size: 8pt; line-height: 1.5; background: #f8f9fc; border-left: 4px solid #1a6b9a; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; padding: 0.9em 1.1em; white-space: pre-wrap; word-break: break-word; overflow-x: hidden; page-break-inside: avoid; margin: 1em 0; color: #1e3a5f; } pre code { font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; background: none; border: none; padding: 0; white-space: inherit; color: inherit; } code { font-family: 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', 'Menlo', monospace; font-size: 8pt; background: #eef2f7; border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 5px; color: #1e3a5f; } blockquote { border-left: 4px solid #f4a261; margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 0.6em 1.2em; color: #5a4a3a; background: #fffbf5; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; page-break-inside: avoid; } blockquote p { margin: 0.3em 0; color: #5a4a3a; } blockquote strong { color: #c9622a; } table { border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%; margin: 1.2em 0; font-size: 9.5pt; page-break-inside: avoid; } th { background: #0d3b66; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Gill Sans', 'Optima', 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5em 0.8em; text-align: left; border: 1px solid #0d3b66; } td { border: 1px solid #c8d6e0; padding: 0.4em 0.8em; color: #1a1a2e; } tr:nth-child(even) { background: #f0f5f9; } tr:nth-child(odd) { background: #ffffff; } .katex-display { overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 1em 0; page-break-inside: avoid; } .katex { font-size: 1.05em; } hr { border: none; border-top: 2px solid #c8d6e0; margin: 2em 0; } table, figure, blockquote, pre { orphans: 3; widows: 3; }

script.content: (function waitForKatex() { if (typeof renderMathInElement === 'undefined') { setTimeout(waitForKatex, 50); return; } renderMathInElement(document.body, { delimiters: [ {left: '$$', right: '$$', display: true}, {left: '$', right: '$', display: false}, {left: '\\(', right: '\\)', display: false}, {left: '\\[', right: '\\]', display: true} ], throwOnError: false, strict: false }); })()

pdf_options.headerTemplate: MATH FOR MACHINE LEARNING — A SOFTWARE ENGINEER'S GUIDE
pdf_options.footerTemplate: of
